zh.lifeSummary: 當David Godolphin esquire於1320年出生在英國可瓦爾格道爾分 克羅斯時，他的父親Alexander de Godolphin25歲，母親Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow39歲。他於大約1380年與Meloir or Malior Cowling在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Godolphin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish, English: locative name from Godolphin (Cornwall), recorded as Wulgholgan in 1194.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When David Godolphin esquire was born in 1320, in Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, his father, Alexander de Godolphin, was 25 and his mother, Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow, was 39. He married Meloir or Malior Cowling about 1380, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Godolphin esquire est né en 1320, à Godolphin Cross, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Alexander de Godolphin, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Meloir or Malior Cowling environ 1380, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Godolphin esquire è nato il nel 1320 nel Godolphin Cross, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Alexander de Godolphin, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Meloir or Malior Cowling circa 1380, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ko.lifeSummary: David Godolphin esquire(이)가 1320년 영국 코른월 고돌필 크로스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander de Godolphin(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Meloir or Malior Cowling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Godolphin esquire родился в 1320 г. в местности годолфин кросс, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander de Godolphin было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret "Marrion" Tremrow, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Meloir or Malior Cowling около 1380 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.
